# Virtual file system write file implementation (2026-03-13 05:39Z)

_**User**_

Implement Task 8 from docs/plans/2026-03-13-dev-shell-impl-plan.md.

**Task 8: 虚拟 FS — 写文件 write_file（TDD）**

1. In tests/vfs_tests.rs add:
   #[test]
   fn write_file_creates_file() {
       let mut vfs = Vfs::new();
       vfs.mkdir("/foo").unwrap();
       vfs.write_file("/foo/f", b"hello").unwrap();
       let n = vfs.resolve_absolute("/foo/f").unwrap();
       match &n { Node::File { content, .. } => assert_eq!(content.as_slice(), b"hello"), _ => panic!() }
   }

2. In src/vfs.rs impl Vfs add write_file(&mut self, path: &str, content: &[u8]) -> Result<(), ()>.
   - Resolve path to absolute; split into segments; parent = all but last segment, file name = last.
   - Ensure parent path exists (must be a Dir). Use the same index-path / get_mut_at approach as mkdir if needed to get &mut to parent Dir, then in parent's children either find node by name and replace with Node::File { name, content } or push new Node::File.
   - If parent path does not exist or is a file, return Err(()).

3. Run: cargo test write_file then cargo test

4. Commit: git add src/vfs.rs tests/vfs_tests.rs && git commit -m "feat(vfs): write_file"

Work directory: /home/ars/richard/2026/pvm_2/dev_shell
Report: implementation, test result, commit.
